name: Quad9 DNS
description: Configures Quad9 (9.9.9.9 / 2620:fe::fe) as the resolver — privacy-respecting, DNSSEC-validating, no data sold. Matches the luciverse_dns.lua upstream and OpenWrt LuCI setup.

filtered.description: Use filtered endpoint (9.9.9.9) with malware blocking. Set false for unfiltered (9.9.9.10).
